name: Diverse Music Library
description: Users want a more extensive music library with diverse recommendations to reduce repetitive listening behavior. This need is evident from reviews complaining about the same songs being played repeatedly.

name: Intuitive Discovery UI
description: Users desire a simpler and more intuitive user interface for music discovery, allowing them to easily find new music. Reviews highlight the current UI as confusing and cluttered.

name: Transparent Recommendation
description: Users want to understand why certain songs are recommended to them, seeking transparency in the recommendation algorithm. This need is reflected in reviews criticizing the repetitive and unexplained recommendations.

name: Mood-Based Discovery
description: Users wish for a feature that allows them to discover music based on their current mood or activity, seeking a more personalized experience. Reviews mention the desire for music that fits their specific situations.

name: Social Music Sharing
description: Users want an intuitive music sharing feature with social discovery capabilities, enabling them to share and discover music with friends easily. Reviews suggest the current sharing process is clunky and manual.
